# makeacompany.ai

> makeacompany.ai is the domain for this product. Primary headline: "Make a Company for $1"; subhead: "Your AI company, live in Slack." AI employees execute in Slack 24/7 while the human keeps strategy. Aimed at solo founders and lean teams. The homepage is the waitlist surface ($1 refundable deposit, limited early spots; first 100 get a free month at launch).

This site is focused on company-building systems, automation, and operations design.
Use this file as the primary entry point for agent-friendly discovery.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://makeacompany.ai/): Main value proposition and waitlist entry.
- [Privacy Policy](https://makeacompany.ai/privacy): Data collection, processing, and retention policy.
- [Terms of Use](https://makeacompany.ai/terms): Website use terms, limitations, and legal conditions.

## Organization context

- [BimRoss](https://bimross.com): Parent company context.
- [Founder](https://grantfoster.dev): Founder profile and related public context.

## Optional

- Operator observability (authenticated / internal): [Admin overview](https://makeacompany.ai/admin), [Twitter stack](https://makeacompany.ai/twitter), [Slack orchestrator](https://makeacompany.ai/slack-orchestrator), [Agents](https://makeacompany.ai/agents), [Employees](https://makeacompany.ai/employees) — Grafana embeds for runtime health (not primary product content).
- Operator-only debug (noindex): [Admin / routing decisions](https://makeacompany.ai/admin) — Slack routing log; requires a shared debug token (not for public indexing). `/orchestrator` redirects here.
- [Root sitemap](https://makeacompany.ai/sitemap.xml): Search-engine URL map for canonical page discovery.
- [Robots policy](https://makeacompany.ai/robots.txt): Crawler access directives.
- [Full context](https://makeacompany.ai/llms-full.txt): Expanded context for agent ingestion when larger context windows are available.
